name: Deviled Rack of Lamb
recipeIngredient: 2 racks of lamb (2-2.5 lbs each, 7-8 chops per rack)
3/4 cup cracker crumbs (6 to 8 saltines), finely ground or matzoh or dry bread crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the oven rack on center level. Heat oven to 500 degrees.
2. Place the racks of lamb in a 14-by-12-by-2-inch roasting pan.
3. Whisk together the oil, mustard, rosemary, salt, and pepper in a small bowl.
4. Coat both sides of the racks with the mixture.
5. Pat on a layer of bread or cracker crumbs.
6. Roast for 20 minutes for rare. Let stand 5 minutes before carving.
Per serving: 646 calories, 67 gm protein, 2 gm carbohydrates, 39 gm fat, 221 mg cholesterol, 13 gm saturated fat, 466 mg sodium.
